prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ Software for the APP **EA211 eTSI** (TJX) 245 PS engine, unlocking 320 PS and 500 Nm torque via optimized inverter calibration, battery preconditioning, and regenerative braking remapping for sustained power delivery in Sport+ mode

Garrett GT2260VK turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 79mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter (HJS) for Euro 6d compliance

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear), and ID5 GTX-specific top mounts (VW OEM part #5Q0 412 331 B) to retain factory camber adjustment range while reducing roll center migration by 12mm
estetica: Rocket Bunny VW ID5 GTX widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber front fenders (25mm wider per side), rear quarter panels (30mm wider), and a 3D-printed ABS diffuser insert with integrated Gurney flap for -22% lift at 120 km/h

OEM+ VW ID.5 GTX carbon fiber side skirts (VW Individual #5NA 071 571 A) with gloss clear coat and laser-etched 'GTX' badging, paired with a custom 3M 2080 Satin Black vinyl wrap on the roof and C-pillars for a 2-tone effect

HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x9.5 ET35 front, 20x11 ET40 rear) in Satin Bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect tires (255/40 R20 front, 295/35 R20 rear) with custom TPMS sensors (Schrader #20008) for real-time tire pressure monitoring via the ID.5 infotainment system
